brand.name: El Pueblo Mexican Food
brand.awardLine: Voted #1 on Yelp's Top Ten Restaurants in North San Diego County.

ticker: CARDIFF · CARLSBAD · CARMEL VALLEY · DEL MAR
FULL BARS · WHISKEY · TEQUILA · MEZCAL · EVERY SPIRIT

hero.headline: The best Mexican food in San Diego.
hero.sub: Cardiff · Carlsbad · Carmel Valley · Del Mar · La Jolla (opening soon) — family-owned, voted #1 on Yelp's Top Ten Mexican Restaurants in North San Diego County. Fish tacos, breakfast burritos, carne asada, full bars.

pillars.title: $1.39 Fish Tacos
pillars.body: Crispy, fried-to-order, chipotle sauce, fresh cabbage and pico. Order as many as you want — there is no limit.

pillars.title: Fresh Every Day
pillars.body: Locally sourced vegetables delivered every morning. Nothing sits overnight. You can taste it in every bite.

pillars.title: Cervezas & Margs
pillars.body: Full bars in Del Mar and Carmel Valley — whiskey, bourbon, vodka, gin, rum, tequila, mezcal. Beers on tap at Del Mar, fresh-pressed margaritas, and every classic cocktail.

awardCallout.line: Voted #1 on Yelp's Top Ten Restaurants — North San Diego County

catering.heroSub: Whether it's a boardroom lunch or a backyard party, our taco bars and party packs feed every size event. Same-day Party Packs or full catering requests — we'll make it easy.

partyPacks.name: Make-Your-Own Tacos Party Pack
partyPacks.description: Your choice of protein, fresh tortillas, and all the fixings — guests build their own.

partyPacks.name: Rolled Tacos (50 ct)
partyPacks.description: Crispy rolled tacos, 50 to the pack, served with guacamole and sour cream.

partyPacks.name: Enchiladas (25 ct)
partyPacks.description: Red or green sauce, your choice of filling. Baked fresh and ready to serve.

partyPacks.name: Quesadilla Party Tray
partyPacks.description: Full tray of quesadillas — cheese, chicken, or carne asada.

partyPacks.name: Chips and Salsa Full Tray
partyPacks.description: Fresh-fried tortilla chips with a 32oz salsa cup.

catering.closingNote: Contact us for pricing and availability. We'll confirm timing and quantities based on your location.

events.heroSub: Discover the vibrant atmosphere at El Pueblo — not only authentic Mexican cuisine, but a lively and inviting space for every kind of gathering. Birthdays, family get-togethers, corporate events — the heated patios at Del Mar and Carmel Valley make party rentals in San Diego simple.
bullets: Heated patios at Del Mar and Carmel Valley — year-round comfort
Full bar with every classic spirit (whiskey, bourbon, vodka, gin, rum, tequila, mezcal), craft margaritas, beers on tap at Del Mar
Catering menus built around your group size
events.note: Note: reservations are not available for tables inside the restaurant — private patios and catering only.

bars.heroHeadline: Two full bars in San Diego County.
bars.heroSub: Whiskey, bourbon, vodka, gin, rum — every classic spirit you'd expect, plus the tequila and mezcal selection you'd hope for at a Mexican kitchen. Cocktails, wine, beers on tap, and the best margaritas in San Diego County. The Del Mar and Carmel Valley bars pour everything, all served alongside the same kitchen that runs fish tacos until midnight.

barLocations.name: Del Mar
barLocations.address: 2673 Via De La Valle, Suite C
highlights: Full bar — whiskey, bourbon, vodka, gin, rum, tequila, mezcal
Beers on tap (rotating local craft + Mexican imports)
Classic cocktails, wine, and fresh-pressed margaritas
Heated outdoor patio · TVs streaming UFC, fútbol & more
barLocations.imageAlt: El Pueblo Del Mar — full bar location

barLocations.name: Carmel Valley
highlights: Full bar — every liquor, classic cocktails, wine
House margaritas, palomas, and seasonal cocktails
Heated patio at The Village at Pacific Highlands Ranch
barLocations.imageAlt: El Pueblo Carmel Valley — full bar location

pillars.title: A Full Bar
pillars.body: Whiskey, bourbon, vodka, gin, rum, tequila, mezcal — every classic spirit, plus wine by the glass. Order anything you'd expect at a great bar.

pillars.title: Cold Beer on Tap
pillars.body: Beers on tap at Del Mar — rotating local craft and Mexican imports. Bottles and cans at every location, always cold.

pillars.title: Cocktails & Margaritas
pillars.body: House margaritas pressed fresh — no syrupy mixes. Plus every classic cocktail done right: old fashioneds, palomas, mojitos, martinis.

cocktails.name: Paloma
cocktails.subtitle: Juicy, tart, & classically refreshing
cocktails.ingredients: Cazadores Reposado Tequila, Grapefruit, Organic Agave, Lime, Fever-Tree Grapefruit, Tajin Rim

cocktails.name: Spicy Gallagher
cocktails.subtitle: Watermelon, low-sugar, high-flavor
cocktails.ingredients: Cazadores Reposado Tequila, Lime, Agave, Fresh Watermelon, Mint, Aloe, Tajin Rim

cocktails.name: El Pueblo Ranch Water
cocktails.subtitle: Low-cal, bubbly, & slightly tart
cocktails.ingredients: Patrón Silver Tequila, Muddled Lime, Topo-Chico Soda

cocktails.name: Hibiscus Mule
cocktails.subtitle: Refreshing ginger kick
cocktails.ingredients: Grey Goose Vodka, Lime Juice, Liquid Alchemist Ginger Syrup, topped with Hibiscus Ginger Beer

cocktails.name: Oaxacan Mai-Tai
cocktails.subtitle: Tropical & bright, hint of smoke
cocktails.ingredients: Ilegal Mezcal, Selva Rey Coconut, Lime, Almond, Passion Fruit, Dry Curaçao, Aromatic Bitters

cocktails.name: Airplane-Mode
cocktails.subtitle: AKA liquid vacation
cocktails.ingredients: Havana Club Aged Rum, Lime, Pineapple Juice, Apricot Liqueur, Ubé Powder

cocktails.name: Love Island
cocktails.subtitle: The piña colada of love
cocktails.ingredients: Selva Rey Coconut Rum, Pineapple, Passionfruit, Strawberry, Coconut

cocktails.name: Whiskey Business
cocktails.subtitle: Berry — dangerous!!
cocktails.ingredients: American Whiskey, Blackberry Purée, Lemon Juice, Agave, Mint

cocktails.name: Espresso Martini
cocktails.subtitle: Choice of vanilla vodka or reposado tequila
cocktails.ingredients: Vanilla Grey Goose Vodka OR Cazadores Reposado, Fresh Espresso, Coffee Liqueur, Organic Agave

givesBack.heroSub: El Pueblo Mexican Food has consistently supported and contributed to the community. We're excited to partner with you through our fundraiser program — a simple, delicious way to raise funds. We donate 20% of net proceeds from your event to make a meaningful impact.
givesBack.applyNote: To ensure everything runs smoothly, please submit your fundraiser application at least one month before your desired event date.
ineligible: Organizations that discriminate against a person or group on the basis of gender, ethnicity, age, race, national origin, disability, political affiliation, sexual orientation, or religious belief
givesBack.disclaimer: El Pueblo reserves the right to review submitted information to confirm tax-exempt status. Applications that do not align with our guidelines may be declined. We maintain the right to deny or cancel any fundraiser at our sole discretion.

contact.heroHeadline: Four open now. One on the way.
contact.heroSub: Five locations across the San Diego coast — all with full menus, all serving the signature $1.39 Fish Taco. Pick the closest and drop in, or send us a message.

gallery.heroEyebrow: The best Mex of the West
gallery.heroSub: A virtual tour of our kitchens, patios, and plates. Colorful fajitas, crispy fish tacos, late-night carne asada — a peek into the world of El Pueblo.

careers.heroSub: El Pueblo is growing — five locations across San Diego County, and La Jolla opening Spring 2026. We're always looking for energetic, reliable people to join the team. Applications are considered without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin, or any factor prohibited by law. We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.
benefits: Health Insurance (Medical, Dental, Vision on select roles)
